title: Chewy Syrian Oatmeal Crumble
description: A quick-fix Syrian dish featuring chewy oatmeal crumbles made with herbs and spices for a flavorful breakfast or snack option that's perfect for plant-based eaters.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine oat flour, honey, ground cumin, paprika, sesame seeds, and salt. Stir well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
Gradually add coconut oil while continuing to mix until the mixture starts to form into a crumb-like texture.
Transfer the crumbled mixture onto an ungreased baking sheet lined with parchment paper or silicon mat.
Bake in preheated oven for 12-15 minutes, or until golden brown and fragrant. Keep an eye on it as overbaking can make them hard.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly before garnishing with fresh parsley.
